jutsu.name: Insect Deception
jutsu.description:
You lay a trap with your insects, preparing for your enemies to cross a line. Select a point you can see within range. This point radiates a 10-foot radius trigger range that is invisible to all but you. If a hostile creature moves into or out of a space affected by your trap, then it triggers. Creatures in the affected area that don’t move cannot trigger this trap. This trap lasts for 1 hour and requires you to be within 120 feet of it to trigger.

When this trap is triggered all creatures of your choice within the affected area must make a Strength saving throw. On a failed save they take 4d6 poison (or Chakra, your choice) damage and are restrained for the next minute and this jutsu then requires concentration to maintain.

While restrained in this way an affected creature remakes their saving throw at the end of each of their turns, retaking the damage on a failed save.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, damage by 1d6. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, its radius size is increases by +5 feet. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, its radius size is increased by +5 feet.

jutsu.name: Insect Sphere
jutsu.description:
You send a swarm of insects to entrap creatures in a select creature. Select a point you can see within range, forcing all creatures in a 5-foot radius of the chosen point to make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save they are grappled in place as you deal 3d8 poison (or Chakra, your choice) damage to the grappled target at the end of each of their turns. Grappled creatures can make a Strength saving throw at the end of each of their turns. On a success, the jutsu ends on them.

While grappled in this way Jutsu the creature casts has its base cost increased by +4.

If you have your Swarm active when you cast this jutsu, you can select a second point within the same range.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, damage by 1d8 and the jutsu cost penalty by +2.

jutsu.name: Parasitic Destruction
jutsu.description:
You send your swarm of insects to strike a creature in range, ignoring cover. Make a ranged ninjutsu attack dealing 4d6 poison (or Chakra, your choice) damage and they must make a Constitution saving throw, gaining a rank of Infested on a failed save.

If you have your Swarm active when you cast this jutsu, you can make a second attack targeting the same or different creature. If a different creature, on a hit you deal your damage to the target as normal. If the same creature, on a hit, you increase the rank of Infested they gain by +1.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Spindle Formation
jutsu.description:
You call upon your insects to swarm in a spiraling formation, slamming into your enemies making it difficult for them to retaliate. Your insect ram forward in a 5-foot wide, 30-foot-long line forcing all creature in the area to make a Dexterity saving throw, being knocked prone and being unable to cast jutsu that require Hand Signs (HS) until the end of their next turn. An affected creature that would cast a jutsu with the HS component, must make either a Ninshou or Illusions skill check vs your jutsu Save DC, being able to cast their jutsu as normal on a success.

If you have your Swarm active when you cast this jutsu affected creatures make their skill check at disadvantage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the range by 5 feet. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, you can change its range to instead a 30-foot cone originating from you. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, its range becomes a 40-foot radius, centered on you.

jutsu.name: Hive Dispersal
jutsu.description:
You disperse into a mound of insect carcasses and shells. You switch positions with insects in the immediate area. Select a space you can see within 20 feet of you and teleport into that space.

If you have your Swarm active when you cast this jutsu it can also be cast as a reaction to taking damage. When cast this way, increase the range of your teleport by +20 feet.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, increase the rank of the teleport by +10. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, when cast as a Bonus action, you can teleport with one additional willing creature.

jutsu.name: Insect Amp
jutsu.description:
You fill your insects with an intense surge of Chakra enhancing their overall potential and abilities.

For the duration, when you cast an Aburame Hijutsu that deals damage, you add your Ninjutsu ability modifier to the damage.

Additionally, for the duration, if you would inflict a rank of Infested, you instead inflict +1 additional rank.

jutsu.name: Gentle Maggots
jutsu.description:
You call upon some of the more helpful insects in your arsenal, and attempt to soothe the pain of your allies. One willing creature in your reach, regains 3d8+4 hit points.

If you have your Swarm active when you cast this jutsu you can also make an Animal handling check vs a DC 20. On a success, you pick with bonus the target benefits from:
• The target loses a rank of one Physical condition it has.
• The target increases its speed by +10 and gains a +1 bonus to its next saving throw before the beginning of your next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the hit points regained by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Insect Jamming
jutsu.description:
You spread hungry insects around you in an attempt to greatly confuse those who rely on sensory based techniques.

You cannot cast this jutsu unless you are obscured in some way.

Select a number of spaces equal to your Ninjutsu ability modifier within 60 feet of you as you spread insects filled with your chakra.

You then suppress your chakra, gaining the benefit of a successful Suppress Chakra skill-based action and then make a Stealth, Ninshou or Illusions check vs the passive perception of all hostile creatures that are aware of you. On a success, you become hidden from them.

For the duration, creatures with Chakra Sense or Chakra Sight struggle to see through the constant pinging of chakra from each of these locations. You become invisible to creatures benefiting from these senses, and they cannot see you unless they deactivate their special senses and attempt to see you with normal vision.

jutsu.name: Insect Jar Technique
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, when you or an allied creature in range would take damage.
jutsu.description:
Your insects swarm around you and allied creatures creating a barrier that covers a 10-foot radius, centered on yourself. The barrier has 5d8 hit points, and intercepts damage meant for you or any creature within the barriers area.

If damage would be applied to you and allied creatures at the same time (Ex. A jutsu that affects an area), it treats the damage each creature would take, as a single instance. This barrier lasts until the beginning of your next turn.

If you have your Swarm active when you cast this jutsu the barrier gains +2 hit points for each die you roll for its hit points.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and hit points by 1d8

jutsu.name: Parasitic Insect Cloud
jutsu.description: Your insects create a noxious gas that is exuded from your body. When you cast this jutsu, you select an area you can see within range and the gas moves to the chosen area. Creatures in the path of the gas on the way to the chosen location, and creatures who start their turn in the gas, make a Constitution saving throw becoming poisoned and taking 6d8 poison damage. At the beginning of a creatures turn where they start inside the gas they repeat the saving throw. As a bonus action on each turn thereafter, for this jutsu’s duration you may move this cloud 30 feet.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and damage by 1d8

jutsu.name: Parasitic Giant Insect
jutsu.description:
As part of the activation of this jutsu, you select one creature you can see within range than has 5 or more ranks of Infested.

You can cast this jutsu once per turn. The target creature has the infestation come to the surface being burrowed from the inside out by parasitic insects as grow in size from the chakra consumed.

The target makes a Constitution saving throw, with a -1 penalty for every rank of Infested beyond 5 they have when this jutsu is cast.

On a failure the insects explode from their pours before returning to your swarm. The affected creature takes 10d12 poison and chakra damage and lose all ranks of Infested. On a success, no further effects.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, the damage by 1d12

jutsu.name: Body Fat Cushion
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you take damage.
jutsu.description:
You expand your body like a balloon reducing damage by cushioning impacts. You gain the following until the start of your next turn.
• Immunity to Bludgeoning, Earth and Cold damage
• Resistance to all other damage types, except Mental, Lightning and Piercing damage until the start of your next turn.

Expansion Crash. You can expand in size fast enough, and large enough to protect your allies. All allied in a 10-foot radius gains the benefit of this jutsu until the end of the current turn.

jutsu.name: Empty Crash
jutsu.description:
You smash the ground upheaving chunks of stone and hurling them towards a target creature within range. Make a ranged Taijutsu attack. On a Hit you deal 5d6 Bludgeoning damage.

Expansion Crash. You enlarge your striking limb before striking the ground. The terrain is left asunder. Select a point connected to the space you are in or the space the target creature is in. A 30-foot cube centered on that point becomes difficult terrain.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the Chakra cost of this jutsu by 3 and damage by 1d6. If this Jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, increase the Calorie cost by +1.

jutsu.name: Human Boulder
jutsu.description:
You expand your body like a balloon retracting your arms and legs inside your fat. You use your Chakra to spin your body like a bowling ball, hurling yourself in a towards a target creature and crushing everything else in your way.

Select a creature whose space you can reach and occupy with your movement. Move yourself into the space of the target and make a melee Taijutsu attack against them. On a hit, you deal your [Unarmed Damage] + 2d12, but don’t add your ability modifier. The target creature is moved to the closest space of your choice within 5 feet that it can occupy.

Creatures in your path, whom you pass through must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 2d12 bludgeoning damage on a failed save and half as much on a successful one. You can only affect a creature once per casting with this jutsu.

Expansion Crash. If you score a critical hit, or creatures fail their saving throw by 5 or more, affected creatures become Staggered.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the Chakra cost of this jutsu by 3, the damage by 1d12. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher increase the calorie cost by +1 and your hair grows and becomes spikes as the damage type becomes piercing and you add your ability modifier to the damage. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, if you roll over the same creature 2 or more times as part of the same movement with this jutsu, when you roll the damage dice, you can select which dice you want to reroll, keeping the second result.

jutsu.name: Ballistic Element Wheel
jutsu.castingTime: Special, as part of casting an Akimichi Hijutsu that makes a melee attack.
jutsu.description:
An Akimichi secret maneuver allowing you to take a nature release you are encountering or clashing with, and turning it against your foes.

When the triggering Akimichi Hijutsu would allow you to make a melee attack against a hostile creature under the effects of, or clash with, a jutsu with a nature release keyword. Make a Contested Strength or Constitution ability check, vs the targets Jutsu save DC. On a success, you Dispel their jutsu’s effects. If they are under the effects of two or more jutsu with a nature release keyword, dispel the oldest, or highest rank one, otherwise, choose at random.

Expansion Crash. Add your proficiency bonus to the contested check.

jutsu.name: Full-Body-Expansion
jutsu.description:
You temporarily expand your entire body growing in size for the duration as you become Large. While large, you gain the following benefits:
• Advantage on Strength ability checks and saving throws.
• Unarmed and Weapon damage you deal is increased by 1d6.

Expansion Crash. Your unarmed and weapon damage die increase by 1 step.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the Chakra cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher increase the calorie cost by +1 and your size instead becomes Huge and the bonus damage becomes 2d6.

jutsu.name: Multi-Size Arm Missile
jutsu.description:
When you cast this jutsu you hold your arm out in front of you as it rapidly stretches and expands. All creatures in range must make a Dexterity saving throw taking your [Unarmed Damage] + 2d8 on a failed save or half as much on a success.

Creatures who failed their saving throw are Bruised, pushed 10 feet, and fall prone.

Expansion Crash. You can change the ranged to Self (30-foot cone) as you swing your arm in an arc.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the Chakra cost of this jutsu by 3 and damage by 1d8. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank, increase the calorie cost by +1 and on a failed save, affected creatures are Staggered.

jutsu.name: Super Open Hand Slap
jutsu.description:
Chakra erupts from the palm of your hand to the point of it becoming visible. This Chakra increases the weight, muscle density and impact of your palms. As a part of the activation of this jutsu, make a melee Taijutsu Attack. On a hit, you deal your unarmed damage + 4d8.

Regardless if you hit or not, all creatures, excluding the original target creature, within 10-fee of the original target, must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 4d8 bludgeoning damage on a failed save or half as much on a successful one.

Expansion Crash. On a hit, the affected creature must make their Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, they are pushed back 20 feet and Dazed.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, Chakra cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Caloric Recharge
jutsu.description:
By spending any number of calories, you are able to regain hit points by forcibly converting them into healing energies.

For every Calorie spent this way, you regain 1d8+1 hit point, up to a maximum of 10 calories spent.

Expansion Crash. You can impart this healing onto a willing creature you can reach. If you do, this casting time becomes 1 Action.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the amount of hit points regained for each calorie spent by +2.

jutsu.name: Human Bullet Yo-Yo
jutsu.castingTime: Special, as part of casting the Human Boulder Akimichi Hijutsu.
jutsu.description:
A complex and frightening technique, that relies on the teamwork you’ve built with your allies.

When casting the Human Boulder Hijutsu, you can cast this jutsu, allowing one or two other allies to synchronize with you by spending their reaction.

The allies that synchronize with you can aid you in the following ways, each selecting one way to aid you (If those allies know the Shadow Possession, Mind Body Transfer or Mind Detection Technique Hijutsu they can select two bullet points each)
• Target. You make your attack at advantage.
• Bounce Back. You can select two creatures to make your attack against instead of one if you are in range of the second.
• Fling. Increase your movement by +30 Feet.
• Bowl Over. Increase the number of times you can force a creature to make a saving throw against Human Boulder by +1.

Expansion Crash. If you cast Human Boulder using Calories, you regain those spent calories. You can only be refunded calories in this way, once every 10 minutes.

jutsu.name: Butterfly Bullet Bomb
jutsu.description:
As part of the requirements for this jutsu, you must have either the Butterfly Mode or Caloric Ignition features active. You use every ounce of strength and determination and put it behind your strike as you attempt to make a devastating attack.

Make a melee Taijutsu attack against a creature in range. On a hit, you deal 7d12 Bludgeoning and all creatures in a 30-foot cone originating from the target creature must make a Strength saving throw, taking half the damage dealt as bludgeoning damage, being knocked back 20 feet and becoming Staggard on a failed save.

Expansion Crash. As part of this casting, you can spend any number of Calories you have remaining, amplifying this effect based on the number spent. Based on the number of calories spent, this jutsu gains the following effects.
• 2 Calories. Increase the damage dealt by +2 for every calorie spent as part of this casting.
• 4 Calories. Make your attack at advantage.
• 6 Calories. The original target must make their strength saving throw, being Stunned on a failed save.
• 8 Calories. All affected creatures makes their saving throws at disadvantage.
• 10 Calories. All affected creatures who fail their saving throw are stunned on a failed save. You cannot regain calories until you complete a long rest.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, Chakra cost of this jutsu by 3 and the initial damage by 1d12.

jutsu.name: Gentle Counter
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you take damage from a melee attack.
jutsu.description: As a part of casting this jutsu, you must be gaining the benefits of the Gentle Fist Stance. You instantly react to an incoming attack. When you are damaged with a melee attack, you may roll 1d8 + Your Unarmed attack bonus. Reduce the damage you received by the result.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and reduce damage by an additional 1d8.

jutsu.name: Palm Rotation
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you take damage, or make a Strength or Dexterity saving throw.
jutsu.description:
You spin at a violent speed, while releasing Chakra from your body, creating a chakra dome, repelling most attacks. Until the start of your next turn, you have a +4 Bonus to AC including to the triggering attack. If you are subject to a jutsu that requires you to make a Strength or Dexterity saving throw you make the save at advantage.

Creatures who are within 5 feet of you when you cast this jutsu must make a Strength saving throw, taking 2d8 Force damage and being pushed back 5 feet on a failed save.

Eight Trigram. You spin faster and faster until you look like a blur within your own jutsu. Using your Gentle fist, you are able to deflect some incoming damage from attacks or effects that get passed your rotation, gaining 6 DR.

jutsu.name: Palm Strike
jutsu.castingTime: Special, as part of dealing [Unarmed Damage] as part of an attack or a jutsu’s casting.
jutsu.description:
You mix in a powerful strike with your open palm, destabilizing a creatures chakra network.

Once per turn, when you deal [Unarmed Damage], this jutsu deals an additional 3d8 chakra damage.

Eight Trigram. You can choose to force the affected creature(s) to make a Constitution saving throw, suffering either Disrupt I or Block I on a failed save.
• Disrupt I: They gain a rank of Network Distortion.
• Block I: They gain a rank of Weakened.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, increase the ranks of Network Distortion to 2.

jutsu.name: Gentle Reprieve
jutsu.description:
As part of the requirements of this jutsu be benefiting from the Gentle Fist Stance. You reach out to touch an allied creature, using your chakra to speed up the flow of their chakra network aiding in their chakra efficiency or recovery.

Action. You allow the target creature to spend up to 2 Chakra die, recovering the result + Your Wisdom modifier.

Bonus Action. Reduce the cost of the next jutsu an allied creature casts by 2. This effect cannot be used on yourself.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of chakra dice that can be spent by +1. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank, as a bonus action, reduce the cost of the allies next jutsu by an additional 1. If cast at S-Rank as a bonus action reduce the allies next jutsu by an additional 2.

jutsu.name: Vacuum Palm
jutsu.description:
You thrust your palm forward at a creature you can see in range creating a blast of Chakra. Make a ranged Ninjutsu attack. On a hit you deal 5d6 force damage.

Eight Trigram. The blast of chakra is invisible. Unless the target has Chakra sight or Chakra sensing, you make this attack at advantage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and damage by 1d6. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, you force the target creature to make a Constitution saving throw, becoming unable to mold Chakra until the beginning of their next turn.

jutsu.name: 8-Trigrams 64 Palms
jutsu.description:
You perform the signature technique of the Gentle fist. Make a single melee Taijutsu attack, vs the AC the result against all creatures of your choice AC, within your unarmed attack range. On a hit, you deal your [Unarmed Damage] + 3d8 Chakra damage. Half of the chakra damage dealt is also dealt as force damage to the target.

Eight Trigram. You can choose to force the affected creature(s) to make a Constitution saving throw, suffering either Disrupt II or Block II on a failed save.
• Disrupt II: They gain 2 ranks of Network Distortion.
• Block II: They gain 2 rank of Weakened.
jutsu.higherLevels:
For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and damage by 1d8. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, you make one additional attack and creatures you strike with both attacks suffer Disrupt III or Block III. You cannot make additional attacks beyond the listed amount for this jutsu.
• Disrupt III: They gain 3 ranks of Network Distortion.
• Block III: They gain 3 rank of Weakened.

jutsu.name: 8-Trigrams Grid Palm
jutsu.description:
You slam your hand on the ground creating a network of grids along the ground that then cover all enemies inflicting great pain on them. Select a point on the space you occupy as you fill a 15-foot radius centered on this point with your special grid. All creatures of your choice, within range, must make a Charisma saving throw, becoming restrained by the intense pain they experience for the duration. Creatures restrained in this way remake their saves at the end of each of their turns.

Eight Trigram. For the duration of this jutsu, creatures who fail their saving throw become unable to cast jutsu that requires hand signs of a rank equal to or lower than the rank of this jutsu.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3.

jutsu.name: Giant Palm Rotation
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, when you or an allied creature within range take damage or make a Strength or Dexterity saving throw.
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Main Branch, Taijutsu, Clash, Barrier
jutsu.description:
The perfected form of the Palm Rotation taught only to those of the main branch of the Hyūga clan. This creates a dome chakra, repelling everything of your choice.

Until the start of your next turn, you and all creatures you have selected to not be affected by this jutsu within 10 feet of you benefit from this Jutsu’s effects.

You and affected allies gain a +4 Bonus to AC; This includes the triggering attack. If any of you are subject to a jutsu that requires you to make a Strength or Dexterity saving throw you make the save at advantage. Creatures benefiting from this jutsu cannot benefit from bonuses to AC from other Reactions.

Hostile creatures who are within 10 feet of you when you cast this jutsu must make a Strength saving throw taking 4d8 Force damage and being pushed back 10 feet on a failed save.

Eight Trigram. The Rotation you erect is potent enough to absorb some impact from damage that leaks through. Yourself and all affected creatures reduces the damage they take from hostile effects by 6, for the duration.

jutsu.name: One-Body Blow
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction which you take when you are grappled, restrained, or Prone.
jutsu.description:
You release Chakra from every Chakra point in the body creating a shockwave originating from you knocking creatures around you away from you.

First, if you are under any of the following conditions; Grappled, Restrained, or Prone, you immediately end them.

Next, all creatures of your choice, within 10ft of you must make a Strength saving throw, being knocked prone on a failed save and becoming unable to mold Chakra for until the end of your next turn.

Eight Trigram. The Chakra you release is not only disruptive, but its destructive as well. All affected creatures that failed their saving throw takes 4d8 force damage or half as much on a successful save.

jutsu.name: Gentle Palm Flux
jutsu.description:
You move and strike between each target with finesse and grace.

You must spend your movement as part of casting this jutsu, moving to reach creatures normally out of reach.

As part of casting this jutsu, spend up to your movement speed, moving to a hostile creature, and making a melee Taijutsu attack, dealing your [Unarmed Damage] + 4d8 chakra damage. On a hit or miss, you move again towards another hostile creature and repeating your attack. You repeat this move and attack sequence until you have no more movement. You cannot attack the same creature more than once.

If you spend all of your movement, and make an attack when you have 0 movement remaining, that attack is made at advantage.

Eight Trigram. Creatures you hit with an attack, must make a Constitution saving throw, gaining 2 ranks of Network Distortion. A creature who fails this saving throw by 5 or more, grants you +10 additional feet of movement.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: 8-Trigrams 64 Palms Defense
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Action or 1 Reaction, which you take when you are damaged.
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Main Branch, Taijutsu, Barrier, Clash
jutsu.description:
Created by a main branch Hyūga years ago as a variation on the 8-Trigrams 64 Palms. Unlike the parent jutsu, this one can be cast in two different ways, offensively as an Action, or defensively as a Reaction.
• Offensive. As an action, all creatures of your choice within your unarmed attack range must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking your [Unarmed Damage] + 4d8 force damage and are pushed back 5 feet.

Eight Trigram. Using the chakra weave created by this jutsu and weaving it into needles, you are able to increase the range of this jutsu to 30 feet and target a number of creatures equal to this jutsu’s ability modifier, forcing each of them to make the saving throw. On a failed save in addition to this jutsu’s normal effects, they also gain 3 ranks of Network Distortion.
• Defensive. As a Reaction to taking damage, gain a +6 Bonus to AC against the triggering attack and all subsequent attacks until the beginning of your next turn. If this reaction triggers a Clash, add 1d6 to your clash check.

Eight Trigram. You weave together a potent barrier of chakra for yourself, gaining twice your [Unarmed Damage] as temporary hit points.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Mountain Crusher
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Side Branch, Ninjutsu, Taijutsu, Clash
jutsu.description:
An advanced and amplified version of the Vacuum Palm. All Creatures in range must make a Constitution saving throw, taking 6d6 force damage on a failed save, being pushed back 15 feet, and lose their reaction until the beginning of their turns on a failed save.

On a successful save, they instead take half damage with no additional effects.

Eight Trigram. This blast of chakra is devastating to everyone on the receiving end. Creatures who failed their save gain 2 ranks of Weakened.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, damage by 1d6, and size of the cone by +5 feet.

jutsu.name: 8-Trigrams 128 Palms
jutsu.description:
The result of years of training to achieve greater techniques than the main branch has borne fruit.

As part of the requirements of this jutsu you must have the 8-Trigrams 64 palms learned.

Make a three melee Taijutsu attacks, VS the AC of all creatures of your choice, that are within 10 feet of you, dashing between them striking faster than the eye can see. On a hit, you deal your [Unarmed Damage] +5d8 Chakra damage. Half of the chakra damage dealt is also dealt as force damage to the target.

Eight Trigram. You can choose to force the affected creature(s) to make a Constitution saving throw, suffering either Disrupt IV or Block IV on a failed save.
• Disrupt IV: They gain 4 ranks of Network Distortion.
• Block IV: They gain 4 ranks of Weakened.
jutsu.higherLevels:
For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and damage by 1d8. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, creatures you strike instead suffer increased effects from Disrupt V or Block V.
Disrupt V: They gain 5 ranks of Network Distortion.
Block V: They gain 5 ranks of Weakened.

jutsu.name: Lion Palm
jutsu.description:
The ultimate main branches jutsu. You release Chakra from your hands molding it into two guardian lions with a visible and intimidating presence. For the Duration of this jutsu, you do not spend Chakra to maintain this jutsu.

As part of the requirements of this jutsu you must have Byakugan active and be benefitting from the Gentle Fist Stance.

Unarmed attacks using the Gentle Fist Stance and Hyūga Clan Hijutsu that make Melee Taijutsu attacks use a D10 for Chakra damage, in place of any listed damage die for chakra damage.

Additionally, in place of any attack you make as part of the attack action or a Hyuga Hijutsu you cast, you can make a ranged Taijutsu attack on a creature you can see up to 30 feet away, firing off one of the Lions like a missile, dealing 3d10 + your highest ability modifier Force damage.

jutsu.name: Chimney Dance
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Taijutsu, Bukijutsu, Fire Release
jutsu.description:
You lace a held weapon or whatever you use to conduct your unarmed strikes with acnegenic smoke. For the duration, damage you deal with these attacks become Poison or Fire (your choice), and deal an additional 1d8 damage of the same type.

If you would score a critical hit while benefiting from this jutsu, the target creature either gains 1 rank of Envenomed, or are Blinded until the end of their next turn.

If you are currently receiving the benefits of the Smoke Style stance, you can make attacks of opportunity at advantage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If cast to B-Rank or higher, increase the damage by 1d8. If cast to S-Rank, increase the damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Fume Substitution
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you take damage
jutsu.description:
You quickly morph your body into smoke to avoid being struck by an enemy's assault. Increase your AC by +4 for the triggering attack and each subsequent attack until the beginning of your next turn.

For each attack that misses you as a result of this jutsu you may force the creature that missed, to make a Constitution saving throw as you release a plume of smoke into their eyes. On a failed save, they gain a rank of Dazzled or Envenomed (your choice).

If you are currently receiving the benefits of the Smoke Style stance, you can move up to 10 feet when an attack misses you.

jutsu.name: Incinerating Burst
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Taijutsu, Bukijutsu, Fire Release, Combo, Chain
jutsu.description:
Your body briefly erupts into a smoldering smoke-like form, moving up to half your movement speed into a space adjacent to a hostile creature within that range. Follow with a smoldering smoke-powered uppercut.

Make a melee Ninjutsu or Taijutsu attack. On a hit, deal 3d12 Fire damage (Ninjutsu) or [Unarmed Damage] / [Weapon Damage] + 1d12 fire damage (Taijutsu). On a hit, the creature makes a Constitution save, being Burned on failure.

If your attack result is 5 or higher than target AC, you can make one additional attack against another creature you could reach, by moving half your movement speed. You can repeat this effect up to twice per casting.

Chain 1: When you score a hit, you can move up to half your movement speed away without provoking attacks of opportunity.

Chain 2: Your attack no longer needs to beat AC by 5 to trigger the additional attack.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the damage by 1d12. If cast at B-Rank or higher, you can perform this jutsu as a Reaction when you would take an attack of opportunity.

jutsu.name: Sulfur Bomb
jutsu.description:
You generate a large quantity of smoke in your hand and throw it at a point within 60 feet, generating a 15-foot radius cloud of smoke centered on the point. Each creature within the affected area must make a Dexterity save, taking 3d8 Fire damage and falling prone on a failed save, or half damage and no further effects on a success.

The smoke persists for 1 minute, heavily obscuring creatures within (you can see through fine). Creatures that end their turn within the smoke take 1d8 poison damage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d8. If upcast to B-Rank or higher, you can disperse leftover smoke as a free action on your turn; otherwise the smoke now lasts 10 minutes.

jutsu.name: Cinder Field
jutsu.description:
You breathe out an enormous quantity of smoke from your mouth, creating a field of heavy gas all around you.

For the duration, a 15-foot radius of smoke surrounds you, heavily obscuring you from creatures who cannot perceive through smoke. Creatures other than you that enter or start their turn in the field take 2d8 Fire damage, plus an additional 4 Fire damage for every 5 feet they willingly move within this radius.

Creatures with a breathing apparatus do not take damage from walking in the area. When you deal Fire damage to creatures in the radius, increase the damage by +2.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the damage dealt by beginning / entering the field by 1d8. If cast at B-Rank or higher, you can perform this jutsu as a reaction when you would take an attack of opportunity. If cast at A-Rank or higher, when you deal fire damage to creatures within this jutsu's radius, increase the damage by +4 instead of +2.

jutsu.name: Smoke Aegis
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, when an allied creature within you could reach with your movement would take damage
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Taijutsu, Bukijutsu, Fire Release, Barrier
jutsu.description:
As an ally begins to succumb to peril, you move quickly to protect them. Select an allied creature whose space you could reach with your movement.

You morph into smoke and dart toward them like a bullet, reform in their space and push them no further than 10 feet to a space that can hold them.

If triggered by an attack: the attack automatically hits you and you raise both arms and form a smoke barrier intercepting the damage with 2d6 + 8 temporary hit points.

If triggered by a failed save: the protected creature no longer suffers the failed-save effects, and you roll the save in their place with a rank of Mastery.

If you reduce the attack's damage to 0 or succeed the save, you can cast an Iburi Hijutsu with a 1-Action casting time targeting the triggering creature.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and the temporary hit points by 1d6 + 2 (or the save bonus by +1).

jutsu.name: Smoke Dragon
jutsu.description:
You release a massive collection of ashen chakra, until it forms into a large dragonoid construct of your description. You send the dragon out, completely overwhelming everything in a 60-foot-long, 10-foot-wide line. All creatures within range must make a Constitution save.

On a failed save, affected creatures take 5d6 Fire damage and gain 1 rank of Dazzled and Envenomed. You control how long this line becomes and where it stops, avoiding affecting unwanted creatures further along.

If you are currently receiving the benefits of the Smoke Style stance, you can morph your whole body into smoke and travel with the dragon without expending your movement. On ending your movement, creatures within 10 feet of you provoke attacks of opportunity from you.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d6. If cast at A-Rank or higher, increase the ranks of each condition inflicted by +1.

jutsu.name: Incinerating Missile
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Taijutsu, Fire Release, Finisher, Chain
jutsu.description:
You release explosive sulfuric smoke from behind you with enough force to crack the ground. This explosion propels you toward your enemy in an instant.

Make a melee Ninjutsu or Taijutsu attack. On a hit, deal 5d12 Fire damage (Ninjutsu) or [Unarmed Damage] / [Weapon Damage] + 3d12 Fire damage (Taijutsu).

On a hit, the creature makes a Dexterity save, being pushed 20 feet away, falling prone, and being Blinded until the end of their next turn on a failure.

Finisher: The strike is a flurry of sulfuric backed strikes, bleeding into the enemy's skin. Affected creatures that make their save must do so at disadvantage. On a failed save they are Confused for the next minute. They make a Constitution save to end Confused.

Chain 3: If your attack is 5 or more than target AC, you regain the action or Bonus Action used to cast this jutsu.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the damage by 1d12.

jutsu.name: Burning Sweep
jutsu.description:
You aggressively slash the air in front of you, creating an awesome shockwave of force, heat and sulfuric smoke that rides across the battlefield.

Creatures caught in the awesome forces within this jutsu's range must make a Dexterity save. Creatures with a movement speed of 0 make this save at advantage. Creatures who fail take 6d8 Fire damage, and suffer any combination of two of the following effects (your choice; can pick the same twice):
• 1 rank of Burned.
• 1 rank of Envenomed.
• 1 rank of Dazzled.

If you are currently receiving the benefits of the Smoke Style stance, you can also choose to select 1 rank of Corroded. Creatures resistant or immune to Acid or Poison damage do not have advantage on saves to resist Corroded or Envenomed granted by this feature.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Body Oxidation Technique
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Genjutsu (Tactile, Inhaled), Fuinjutsu, Fire Release, Stable
jutsu.description:
The signature jutsu of the Iburi clan — the user enters the body of a creature and takes control of their actions. Select a creature in range. They make a Charisma save; on failure, you enter their body, rendering them Incapacitated and unable to move. You feel everything they feel and take physical control.

During your turn in initiative, you take your turn as normal, but the afflicted creature's body performs the actions. If a creature would harm you, the afflicted creature takes damage / suffers the conditions. While controlling them, conditions impacting their rolls also impact yours.

When the afflicted creature takes damage, they remake their save and you take half the damage they took as Necrotic damage. At the start of each of their turns, they remake their save, expelling you on a success. When the jutsu ends, you reappear in a space within 5 feet of the creature you were possessing.

jutsu.name: Orbital Drop
jutsu.description:
You move up to your movement speed to a space within range and send yourself high into the air with a burst of smoke. Your body splits into 3 pillars of smoke that rise tangent to each other 200 feet into the air. As they rise, they are set on fire from the friction. The pillars merge back into your body and you hurl back down to earth like a missile.

Select a point you can see within 60 feet of the space you were in when you cast this jutsu. You crash into the ground creating a massive explosion originating from the chosen point, annihilating creatures within a 60-foot radius sphere.

Each creature in range must make a Dexterity save, taking 7d10 Fire damage, gaining 2 ranks of Burned, and becoming Blinded for 1 minute on a failed save, or half damage on a successful save.

A creature blinded by this jutsu can spend their Bonus Action to make a Constitution save, ending the Blinded condition on a success. The affected area becomes permanently difficult terrain.

jutsu.name: Gouge and Claw
jutsu.description:
With sharpened claws or teeth, you make a flurry of gouging strikes. Make two melee Taijutsu attacks dealing [Unarmed Damage] (or [Weapon Damage] if using a weapon) + 2d4. If you deal damage as part of casting this jutsu, affected creatures must make a Constitution save, being knocked prone on a failure.

Tag-Team: Your Nin-Dog follows up with sharp fangs and claws. They make a melee Taijutsu attack dealing their Bite damage. If they deal damage as part of this Tag-Team and the affected creature failed their original save, they gain a rank of Bleed.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by +1d4. If cast at B-Rank or higher, increase the number of attacks your Nin-Dog makes by +1. If cast at S-Rank, increase the number of attacks you make by +1.

jutsu.name: Tunneling Fang
jutsu.description:
You spin like a drill, with your body becoming a blur attempting a spiraling sweep attack. Select a space you can see up to 30 feet away and move into that space. This movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

If you end this movement adjacent to at least one hostile creature, make a melee Taijutsu attack against all hostile creatures, comparing the result vs each AC. On a hit, deal [Unarmed Damage] (or [Weapon Damage] if using a weapon) + 2d6 bludgeoning damage.

Tag-Team: Your Nin-Dog follows up with their own spinning body slam. They move up to 30 feet and must end adjacent to one of the affected creatures, then make a melee Taijutsu attack dealing their Bite damage + 1d6, and your Nin-Dog becomes Feral.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d6 for both you and your Nin-Dog.

jutsu.name: Dynamic Marking
jutsu.description:
You command your Nin-Dog to leap into the air and mark all creatures in a 10-foot cube, centered on a point of your choice within your Nin-Dog's movement range. Marked creatures exude a faint but obvious stench that can be tracked by you or your Nin-Dog.

For the duration, you and your Nin-Dog are always aware of the direction of a marked creature and have blindsight only against marked creatures.

For the duration, when you take the Search action to find an affected creature, you have advantage on the check. Attacks you and your Nin-Dog make have a +1 bonus to hit against marked creatures.

jutsu.name: Lick Wounds
jutsu.description:
You lick your wounds, using chakra to stitch them close or force scar tissue to grow at an accelerated rate. You can spend up to 2 Hit Dice. For every hit die spent, roll 2 dice the same size as your hit dice. You regain hit points equal to the result.

Tag-Team: Your Nin-Dog follows your lead and licks their wounds, rolling 2d10 and regaining the result.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3. If cast at C-Rank, you can command your Nin-Dog to instead lick the wounds of an ally they are adjacent to. When they do, that ally can benefit from this jutsu's effect as if they were casting it. If cast at B-Rank, increase the number of Hit Dice you can spend by +1. If cast at S-Rank, increase by +2.

jutsu.name: Fang Over Fang
jutsu.description:
You spin at an accelerated rate, chasing down enemies and slashing into them with each pass.

As part of casting, move up to your movement speed. You can pass through creatures' spaces. Make a melee Taijutsu attack against each creature you pass through dealing [Unarmed Damage] (or [Weapon Damage]) + 4d6, and force a Constitution save (Bruised on failure). A creature can only be attacked once per casting.

Tag-Team: Your Nin-Dog follows up with a spiraling cross. They move up to their movement speed passing through creatures' spaces and make a melee Taijutsu attack for each creature they pass through, dealing their Bite damage + 2d6. If the Nin-Dog deals damage to a creature that failed their original save, that creature is also Dazed.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d6 for both you and your Nin-Dog.

jutsu.name: Feral Boost
jutsu.description: You use chakra to manipulate the primal part of your brain, making you more feral than normal. You can cast this jutsu on your turn at no action cost. When you do, you enter the Feral state.

jutsu.name: Cross Guard
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you or your Nin-Dog takes damage
jutsu.description:
You retaliate with sharpened claws, meant to punish would-be assailants.

Reduce the triggering damage by [Unarmed Damage] + [Unarmed Damage] (or [Unarmed Damage] + [Weapon Damage] if you have a weapon equipped).

If your Nin-Dog cast this, they reduce the triggering damage by Bite + Bite.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage reduction by 1d6 for both you and your Nin-Dog.

jutsu.name: Wolf Pack
jutsu.description:
A modified version of the Shadow Clone Technique — you make numerous clones of you and your Nin-Dog filling a 30-foot radius centered on you.

When cast, you gain a Pack Dice (d8). For the duration, once per turn, when you or your Nin-Dog misses an attack, either can remake the roll and must roll the Pack Dice.

Additionally, for the duration, once per turn, if a hostile creature would deal damage to you or your Nin-Dog, you can use a clone to soften the impact, reducing damage taken by twice the roll of the Pack Dice. When you do, roll the Pack Dice. On a roll of 1 or 2, reduce the dice size by 1 stage. If you roll 1 or 2 on a d4, the jutsu ends early.

jutsu.name: Fang Wolf Fang
jutsu.description:
As part of the requirements of this jutsu, you must be Feral. You perform a much more devastating variation of the Tunneling Fang, in tandem with your Nin-Dog. Your dog transforms into a Beast-Human clone (if not already) and locks hands with you. You both spin in tandem, creating a cyclone of fangs and claws. Cannot be cast if you are in your Two-Headed Wolf form.

All creatures in a 10-foot wide, 60-foot-long line originating from you must make a Dexterity save, taking [Unarmed Damage] (or [Weapon Damage]) + your Nin-Dog's Bite damage + 5d6 piercing damage and having defenses shredded — AC and DR both reduced by 2 until your next turn on a failed save, or half damage and no further effects on a success.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d6 and the AC / DR shred by +1.

jutsu.name: Tail Chasing Fang
jutsu.description:
As part of the requirements of this jutsu, you must have the Two-Headed Wolf form. An ultra-violent variation on the Fang Wolf Fang technique where you curl into a ball and roll at a ferocious speed in a spiral shape, crushing and gouging everything in your way.

You begin to ravage all creatures of your choice in a 40-foot radius centered on you. They must make a Dexterity save, taking Bite + 3d8 slashing & 3d8 piercing damage, and having their defenses shredded — reducing AC and DR by 4 until your next turn on a failed save, or half damage on a successful one.

jutsu.name: Swift Release: Accelerate/Decelerate
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you see a creature within range take damage
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Genjutsu (Tactile, Visual), Fuinjutsu, Wind Release, Lightning Release
jutsu.description:
You focus your Chakra, accelerating or decelerating the impact of an attack or jutsu, lessening or multiplying its force.

Accelerate. The target takes 2d10 extra Wind or Lightning damage from the triggering instance of damage.

Decelerate. Reduce the damage dealt by the triggering instance by 2d10.

Interdiction Seal. A creature marked with this seal that takes additional damage or has their damage reduced must make a Charisma save. On a failed save, chains shoot from the seal, anchoring them to the ground until the end of their next turn — they cannot move more than 5 feet from their current space and take a -1 penalty to Dex saves.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and the damage dealt / reduced by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Swift Release: Mirror Image Technique
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Genjutsu (Visual), Fuinjutsu, Wind Release, Lightning Release
jutsu.description:
You utilize Swift Release, manifesting illusory duplicates of yourself maintained by your speed alone — three clones appear in your space. For the duration, the clones move with you and mimic your actions, shifting positions so it's impossible to track which image is real. You can use your Bonus Action to dismiss the clones.

Each time a creature targets you with an attack, roll a d8 for each remaining duplicate. If any d8 is 4+, a duplicate is hit instead and dismissed.

If the targeting creature has True Sight, Tremor Sense, or Chakra Sight, the threshold becomes 6+ instead.

Interdiction Seal. When you attack a creature marked with this seal, your duplicates join in. You can dispel one active clone to grant yourself a d4 bonus to the attack result. Alternatively, marked creatures that deal damage to you with an attack have the threshold to hit a duplicate reduced by 2.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3. If cast at B-Rank, increase the number of duplicates by +1. If cast at S-Rank, increase by +2.

jutsu.name: Swift Release: Flicker
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you take damage
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Taijutsu, Bukijutsu, Fuinjutsu, Wind Release, Lightning Release
jutsu.description:
You flicker in place so quickly that attacks and hostile effects phase through you. Until your next turn, the first time each turn that you take damage (including the triggering instance), roll a d4 and gain the benefit of the result.

• 1: Gain 4 damage reduction to that instance.
• 2: Increase DR by +2, applied to each instance of damage until the end of the turn.
• 3: Same as 2 but with resistance instead.
• 4: Same as 3, but you gain immunity to the triggering instance.

jutsu.name: Swift Release: Air Shattering Strike
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Taijutsu, Bukijutsu, Fuinjutsu, Wind Release, Lightning Release
jutsu.description:
You move at the speed of intent, instantly striking out faster than the eye can see at a creature within range, shattering the air like glass as you move.

Make a melee Ninjutsu (or Taijutsu) attack against a target you can see within range. On a hit, the target takes 4d10 Wind or Lightning damage (Ninjutsu) or [Unarmed Damage] (or [Weapon Damage]) + 2d10 (Taijutsu).

Interdiction Seal. When your attack lands, you prime the seal. If the affected creature willingly moves before your next turn, the seal detonates — the creature takes 3d10 force damage and must make a Constitution save. On a failed save they are teleported into a space that can hold them as close as possible to another creature / object marked with your Speed Seal. If no other creature is marked, they do not teleport.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3, the damage by 1d10 and you can make one additional attack against another creature within range.

jutsu.name: Swift Release: Aura of Quickness
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Fuinjutsu, Wind Release, Lightning Release
jutsu.description:
You extend your chakra creating a 15-foot radius aura that occasionally crackles with a soft yellow spark.

In combat — duration becomes Concentration, up to 1 minute. The aura moves with you, centered on you, and each creature of your choice that begins its turn within your aura gains +10 ft speed until your next turn.

In exploration / travel — duration becomes 1 hour. You and your team treat normal travel pace as Fast travel pace.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and allied creatures' bonus speed by +10 ft.

jutsu.name: Swift Release: Shadowless Flight
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Taijutsu, Bukijutsu, Fuinjutsu, Wind Release, Lightning Release
jutsu.description:
You prime all Speed Seals marking a creature and use them to flash between each at blinding speeds. Make a melee Ninjutsu (or Taijutsu) attack vs the AC of all marked creatures.

On a hit, you deal 5d6 Wind or Lightning damage (Ninjutsu) or [Unarmed Damage] (or [Weapon Damage]) + 3d6 (Taijutsu). Each affected creature must then make a Dexterity save, being Concussed on failure.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d6. If cast at B-Rank or higher, you can select one damaged creature and teleport into a space adjacent to them.

jutsu.name: Swift Release: Thunder Flash
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Taijutsu, Bukijutsu, Fuinjutsu, Wind Release, Lightning Release
jutsu.description:
You move like a blur and rush forward with explosive power. As part of casting, move to the furthest unoccupied space in a 30-foot long, 5-foot-wide line from your current position. This movement does not provoke opportunity attacks and you can move through other creatures' spaces.

Each creature you pass through must make a Dexterity save, taking 6d6 Wind or Lightning damage on a failed save, half on a success. If you used your Taijutsu save DC, they instead take [Unarmed Damage] (or [Weapon Damage]) + 3d6 on a failed save or half on a success.

Interdiction Seal. If your movement passes through a creature marked with a Speed Seal, you can move an additional 15 feet, but can change direction after leaving their space. You must still move in a straight line. Cannot affect a creature more than once.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Swift Release: Spatial Step
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Fuinjutsu, Wind Release, Lightning Release
jutsu.description:
You draw a special fuinjutsu symbol onto yourself allowing yourself to slip into and out of a pocket dimension of your creation. At the end of each of your turns, roll a d8. On a roll of 5 or higher, you vanish from your current location, appearing in your pocket dimension.

At the start of your next turn, and when the jutsu ends, you return to an unoccupied space of your choice that you can see within 10 feet of the space you vanished from. If no unoccupied space is available within range, you appear in the nearest unoccupied space chosen at random.

While in your pocket dimension: you only see shades of gray; you can't see further than 60 feet away from your vanish point; you cannot interact with the material dimension. If you end concentration early while in the pocket dimension, you return at the beginning of your following turn.

jutsu.name: Swift Release: Spatial Wall
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Fuinjutsu, Wind Release, Lightning Release, Barrier
jutsu.description:
You weave together a wall of shimmering blocks of sealing symbols on a solid surface within range. You can make a straight wall up to 30 ft long, 20 ft high, 1 ft thick, or a cylindrical wall up to 20 ft high, 1 ft thick and 20 ft in diameter. The wall can be seen through as if looking through a foggy glass window.

This wall cannot be climbed or walked on, and acts like a solid barrier that repels organic creatures. Ranged Ninjutsu / Taijutsu / Bukijutsu / Weapon attacks or Ninjutsu with a special shape that attempts to pass through (or originate within) the barrier is turned back on its caster, making its target the original caster, using the caster's original attack vs their own AC. Genjutsu targeting creatures on the opposite side is not redirected.

This barrier is extremely draining — the cost to maintain is its original casting cost.

jutsu.name: Swift Release: Speed Siphon
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Fuinjutsu, Wind Release, Lightning Release
jutsu.description:
Your mastery of Swift Release and Fuinjutsu allows you to remove speed from one creature within range. Select a creature you can see within range; you begin to drain their movement and speed. For the duration, at the beginning of each of the target's turns, they must make a Charisma save. On a failure, they become Slowed and Dazed.

While Slowed / Dazed in this way, the target has disadvantage on all attack rolls as its speed and movement is being taken away, and neither condition ends early; they remain applied for the duration of this jutsu.

A creature that succeeds the save ends both Slowed and Dazed until they remake their save on their following turn for the duration.

Interdiction Seal. A creature with a Speed Seal affected by this jutsu suffers a -1 penalty to their save each time they succeed, stacking up to 4 times.

jutsu.name: Shadow Imitation
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, to an ally taking damage
jutsu.description:
You manipulate your shadow and stretch it outwards, fusing your shadow with a willing creature. As a reaction, you grant the target creature your shadow is attached to a +2 to their AC and advantage on Dexterity saving throws until the beginning of your next turn.

Bright. Increase the range of this jutsu to 60 feet.

Dimly Lit. This jutsu can affect +1 additional creature of your choice.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and the AC bonus by +1.

jutsu.name: Shadow Neck Binding
jutsu.description:
As part of the same action used to use your Shadow Possession clan feature or any jutsu that inflicts the Shadow Bound condition, you attempt to strangle all affected creatures. If a creature fails their save against your Shadow Possession, they take 3d12 Bludgeoning or Necrotic damage as they have their throats crushed by their own Shadows on a failed save, or half on a success.

Bright. The shadowy hands pull a creature who failed their save to the ground, prone.

Dimly Lit. A creature that succeeded their save gains a rank of Demoralized or Shaken (your choice).
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d12.

jutsu.name: Shadow Silhouette Distraction
jutsu.description: By molding Chakra into your shadow, you are able to give it a shape as it stands up from the ground, but it retains an extremely thin width. Your shadow stands as tall as you and follows your every whim. It cannot grab or carry anything nor can it touch or interact. This jutsu is extremely useful for distractions and misdirection. It can be used from stealth without revealing your location and can also be used alongside a stealth roll.

jutsu.name: Shadow Gathering
jutsu.description:
You materialize thin tendrils of shadows that you can control to interact with objects. This jutsu can be used to slide under doors, through small holes, and other entrances that would otherwise be impossible to squeeze through. As part of casting this jutsu, you can use any of the following activities:
• Steal (nothing larger than 25 pounds)
• Disable a Device / Trap
• Pick a Lock

jutsu.name: Shadow Sewing Needle
jutsu.description:
You materialize your shadow but splinter and sharpen them into needle-like spikes. You create 5 needle-like threads of shadow. Make a single ranged Ninjutsu attack against up to 4 target creatures within range, once each.

On a hit, deal 2d6 piercing damage. You can choose to send more than one tendril toward a single creature — increase the damage by 1d6 for each additional tendril targeting them. Regardless of the number of tendrils, you only ever make a single ranged Ninjutsu attack per creature.

On a successful hit, affected creatures must make a Strength save. On a failed save they are Shadow Bound until the end of their next turn.

Bright. On a miss, you can remake the attack, once per casting.

Dimly Lit. If at least two tendrils were used against a target, on a hit they are pulled 10 feet closer for each tendril used.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and the number of tendrils by 1.

jutsu.name: Shadow Imitation Field
jutsu.description:
You expand your shadow in a 20-foot radius circle centering on a point of the space you currently occupy, capturing all creatures within it who are on the same surface as you. All creatures in the radius upon activation must make a Strength save, being Shadow Bound on a failed save for the duration. On an affected creature's turn, they can make a Strength save to break free, ending the effect on them.

Bright. Affected creatures making their saves suffer a -1 penalty to the result.

Dimly Lit. Creatures Shadow Bound by this jutsu are slowly strangled, taking 3d12 bludgeoning or necrotic damage at the beginning of each creature's turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and the radius by 5 ft.

jutsu.name: Shadow Tendrils
jutsu.description:
You extend your shadow to a point you can see within 60 feet. All creatures in a 15-foot cube originating from this point must make a Dexterity save. On a failed save, they are grabbed by dozens of shadowy hands taking 5d6 bludgeoning or necrotic damage and are Shadow Bound for the duration. They make a Strength or Dexterity save at the end of each of their turns, ending the condition or taking half on a success.

Creatures that end their turn Shadow Bound by this jutsu take 3d6 bludgeoning or necrotic damage.

Bright. Increase the size of the cube by +5 feet.

Dimly Lit. Creatures that fail their save are disarmed as the shadows pull their weapons away. Disarmed weapons are bound to the ground and require an Athletics check vs your jutsu save DC to pick up, for the duration.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and the initial damage by 1d6. If cast at A-Rank or higher, increase the damage dealt at the end of a creature's turn by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Black Spider Lily
jutsu.description:
An advanced version of Shadow Tendrils. You manifest inky black tendrils of shadow that answer your call from your shadow itself. For the duration, you can spend your Action to perform any of the following abilities.

Shadow Drill. Make a melee Ninjutsu (or Genjutsu) attack with a range of 10 feet against a creature you can see. On a hit, deal 5d8 piercing or necrotic damage and the affected creature makes their next Strength save at disadvantage.

Sea of Spears. All creatures of your choice within 10 feet of you must make a Dexterity save, taking 3d8 piercing or necrotic damage and being Shadow Bound until the end of their next turn, or half on a success.

Shadow Barrier. Select up to two willing allies within 30 feet of you. They are encircled by a bubble of spiraling shadows granting them 3d12 + 8 temporary hit points, lasting until your next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and dice rolled for damage or temporary hit points by +1.

jutsu.name: Shadow Transport Technique
jutsu.description: You can select a creature currently Shadow Bound and fall into your shadow, moving through it and coming out within 5 ft of the Shadow-Bound target.

jutsu.name: Shadow Web Execution
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take at the beginning or end of other creatures' turns
jutsu.description: Your control over shadows is absolute. You can make their own shadows turn against them. All creatures currently Shadow Bound must make a Constitution save. On a failed save, affected creatures take 12d8 Bludgeoning, Piercing or Necrotic damage and suffer 1 rank of Exhaustion, or half damage on a successful save and no further effects.
